tasks.title: Lighten light mode theme and fix hardcoded colors
tasks.description: Update the [data-theme='light'] CSS custom properties to use a cleaner, brighter palette. Fix hardcoded gradients and borders that don't respond to theme changes.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Light mode has noticeably lighter/whiter backgrounds, softer text colors, and no hardcoded dark-theme colors leaking through. The mode select title gradient and .btn-secondary border use CSS variables.
tasks.claudeMd:
# Project Context

You are updating the light mode theme for a vanilla HTML/CSS/JS word puzzle game (Daily Addicted).

## What to change

All changes are in `css/style.css`.

### 1. Update `[data-theme='light']` block (lines 50-84)

Replace the warm beige palette with a cleaner, brighter one:

| Variable | Old | New |
|---|---|---|
| `--bg-primary` | `#f5f0e8` | `#fafafa` |
| `--bg-secondary` | `#ede8df` | `#f3f3f5` |
| `--bg-surface` | `#e2ddd4` | `#e8e8ec` |
| `--text-primary` | `#2c2c34` | `#3a3a44` |
| `--text-secondary` | `#6b6b78` | `#8a8a98` |
| `--text-muted` | `#9b9ba8` | `#b0b0bc` |
| `--cell-hover-bg` | `#d8d3ca` | `#dddde2` |
| `--cell-hover-border` | `rgba(0,0,0,0.08)` | `rgba(0,0,0,0.06)` |
| `--title-gradient-start` | `#2c2c34` | `#3a3a44` |
| `--title-gradient-end` | `#5a5a68` | `#8a8a98` |

### 2. Fix `.mode-select-title` hardcoded gradient (line 136)

Change:
```css
background: linear-gradient(135deg, #e8e8f0, #a8a8c0);
```
To:
```css
background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--title-gradient-start), var(--title-gradient-end));
```

### 3. Fix `.btn-secondary` hardcoded border (line 342)

Change:
```css
border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15);
```
To:
```css
border: 1px solid var(--border-light);
```

### 4. Fix `.btn-secondary:hover` hardcoded background (line 346)

Change:
```css
background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
```
To:
```css
background: var(--hover-overlay);
```

## Conventions
- This is a static HTML/CSS/JS project, no build step
- Theme is toggled via `data-theme` attribute on `<html>`
- All theme colors should go through CSS custom properties
- Do not change the dark theme (`:root` block)

## Testing
- Open `index.html` in browser, toggle to light mode, verify backgrounds are noticeably lighter/whiter and text is readable but softer
- Check mode select screen, game screen, and modals all look correct

checklist.description: Update light theme CSS variables to use brighter, cleaner palette
steps: Update --cell-hover-bg to #dddde2, --title-gradient-start/end to match new text colors

checklist.description: Fix hardcoded dark-theme colors that don't respond to theme toggle
steps: Change .mode-select-title gradient to use var(--title-gradient-start) and var(--title-gradient-end)

quality_checklist.description: No remaining hardcoded color values that should be CSS variables in theme-sensitive contexts
steps: Grep for hardcoded hex colors and rgba values outside of :root and [data-theme] blocks
Verify any found are intentional (e.g. specific hover states for mode buttons)

checks.description: Light mode backgrounds are visibly lighter/whiter than before
steps: Verify the page background is near-white (#fafafa), not beige
Verify grid cells have a light gray background, not warm beige

checks.description: Mode select title displays correctly in light mode
steps: Load the app in light mode
Check the 'Daily Addicted' title on the mode select screen uses dark text gradient, not the dark-theme light gradient
